steps.title: Use the given $y$-value
steps.content: The first equation gives $y=4$. Substitute into $x=y+6$: $$x=4+6.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A is correct. Choice C is $y$, not $x$, and the other choices do not satisfy $x=y+6$ when $y=4$. The ordered pair would be $(10,4)$, so the requested $x$-value is $10$.
